response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or advanced AI credentials required for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and systems design
Proven ability to lead cross-functional technical work and share knowledge through workshops and talks
concerns: No clear evidence of building or shipping AI/ML products or platforms as required
Lacks documented expertise in cloud AI strategy, customer advisory, or large-scale AI system design
No advanced degree in AI-related field; education is BS in CS with unrelated second bachelor's
